output.summary: Chunked causal eval-then-train TTT on validation with Int5 quantization, EMA, XSA, and Muon-tuned 11-layer architecture.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Causal test-time training sequentially evaluates then trains each validation chunk, never revisiting scored tokens.
techniques: Chunked causal eval-then-train TTT on validation data
Int5-all quantization with FP16 for tied embeddings and key projections
EMA plus XSA in later layers over a Muon-optimized 11-layer GPT
